# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary architecture and analysis artifacts generated during assessment.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level application and component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - Declared dependency landscape grouped by functional category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity model, and repository/data ownership analysis.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Profiles, properties, secrets handling, and runtime configuration inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core domain workflows, rules, and business process sequence.
